cp_what_is_text: Cookies are small text files placed on your computer or mobile device to collect standard internet information and visitor behavior information. When you visit this website, we may collect information from you automatically through cookies or similar technology. For more information, visit
cp_how_use_text: This site use cookies to improve your experience. The types of cookies this site use are technical and strictly necessary:
cp_pure_desc: Stores your cookie preferences (so if you accept you won’t be asked again)
cp_lang_desc: Stores the language selected by the user to apply it on your next visits.
cp_nav_sub: Allowing you to navigate between pages efficiently.
cp_snavid_desc: Stores current page id and carousel tridimensional position.
cp_how_manage_text: You can set your browser not to accept cookies. You can also delete all cookies that are already on your device on your browser settings. Each browser is different, search your browser documentation to learn the correct way to modify your cookies preferences.
pp_intro: This privacy policy explains how this website handles personal data, even though no such data is collected during your visit.
pp_what_data_text: This website does not collect any kind of personal data from you. However, this website uses cookies to manage navigation and user preferences. You can check our cookie policy
pp_how_used: How your data will be used
pp_how_used_text: Your personal data will not be processed or used because this website does not collect any personal data from its visitors.
pp_rights_title: Your data protection rights under GDPR
pp_rights_text: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), individuals have specific rights regarding their personal data. Although this website does not collect or store your data, you generally hold the following rights:
pp_r1_d: You can request information about stored data and correct any inaccuracies.
pp_r2_d: You can request the deletion of your personal data under certain conditions.
pp_r3_t: Right to restrict or object to processing:
pp_r3_d: You have the right to limit or object to how your data is handled.
pp_r4_d: You can request the transfer of your data to another organization or directly to you.
pp_r5_d: You have the right to complain to a data protection supervisory authority.
pp_contact_text: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, feel free to contact us via email at
triflyke_info: Interactive concept vehicle. The user can switch between the two vehicle modes and explore them from different angles, integrated into an artistic architectural background.
trifloho_info: Explore this floating tiny house and see the fish through the lower deck bedroom window.
diff_desc: Mechanical differential model. The user can decrease the rotational speed on one side of the output shafts to see the planetary gears working.
rec_intro: Choose the type of wood or leather of your preference. Explore all the comfortable positions of the recliner, as if you had the remote control in your hand.
mansao_intro: Explore and share your designs and projects, from early concepts to final completion. Give your clients a complete perspective.
robta_intro: Explore the performance and specifications of this robotic arm configuration. Every single point within the arm tip's reach can be easily located.
con_desc_no_form: If you have a proposal or want to discuss a project, please reach out via the official platforms below:
msg_success: Thank you! Your quote request has been sent.
msg_error: Oops! There was a problem submitting your request.
title_choose_contact: How would you like to receive your quote?
